name: roadmap
description: Visual learning-path presentation of a course (modules→lessons + completion status), derived client-side from the courses + progress slices — no new tables/convex, no routes. Ported from CareerPack's dependency-free skill-roadmap renderer.
notes: 0.1.0 (2026-07-08): ported the roadmap VISUAL from CareerPack frontend/slices/skill-roadmap (a dependency-free flex+lucide recursive node renderer) and REBUILT the data layer onto this app's courses/progress queries. Deliberately did NOT port convex/roadmap — CareerPack's template/seed model solves a 'many career templates, one active roadmap doc' problem this app doesn't have; here the source of truth is already courses→modules→lessons + lessonCompletions, so the roadmap is a pure derived presentation. Reads the courses + progress BARRELS only (P1).
